legend.verification: Each feature has an executable verification command. State advances to 'passing' ONLY when verification succeeds.

features.behavior: Squad screen: shows all members with stats, player detail overlay, training (costs coins, increases stat), release player (refunds coins, reduces squad)
League table with 10 teams, player team highlighted, promotion zone for top 2, season end triggers at match 15
Market overlay from hub: buy tab shows listings, sell tab shows squad players
5-zone alignment (-100 to +100), inertia at extremes, zone-specific theming, sponsor tier matching, clean streak tracking
Mafia banner in grey/corrupt zones, hidden for clean players, blocked during investigation, declining increases alignment
Debt escalation (stage increase, 20% interest), pay debt deducts black money, fails without funds
Investigation starts at high heat (5 match countdown), tribunal resolves with evidence-weighted verdict (7 possible outcomes)
Pep talk boosts morale (costs coins), media bribe reduces heat (costs coins), both fail without funds
Tutorial shows for new game, skippable via button
Settings overlay with team name input, saves on confirm
Procedural team crests (SVG), power ring, battle card, player silhouettes, spring physics, animated gradient backgrounds per screen, glass panels with elevation
Match with 3-player squad, max/min heat, max/min alignment, zero coins — no crashes

features.behavior: Season/battle pass with tiered rewards

features.behavior: 5-faction Power Web hub panel + police case pipeline (named inspectors, bribe/political-pressure) + weekly underworld event engine (hafta / election funding / rival throw-match offer) as one-decision-per-match-week cards
features.evidence: Increment 1 shipped 2026-07-09. GS.factions (lazy initFactions: syndicate/thana/neta/bhai/bosses). renderPowerWeb() -> #power-web-panel 5 .pw-row (dot + rel meter + head + live status) every updateHub. renderCaseFile() -> FIR->Evidence->Chargesheet->Court stage track + named inspector (INSPECTORS: greedy/ambitious/incorruptible) + bribeInspector()/applyPoliticalPressure() action buttons under #investigation-panel. processUnderworldWeek(won) wired into endMatch (priority hafta > election-funding > rival offer) -> .uw-note lines + #uw-event-card with type-specific buttons bound via bindUnderworldEvent. 6 new E2E in comprehensive.spec.js (test.describe 'Underworld Core'); full suite 120 passed 2026-07-09; browser-verified live (Power Web, case file, hafta card). Next increments: rival outgoing bribes UI, mafia/politicians/local-leaders screens.

features.behavior: Rival boss two-way bribes complete — you can bribe your next rival boss to throw the match for you (outgoing direction; incoming rivaloffer->matchfixlose shipped in F39)
features.evidence: Increment 3 shipped 2026-07-09. bribeRivalToThrow(name) + bribeRivalToThrowCost (150 + round(strength), paid in blackMoney). Guards: must be your next opponent, no fix already set, not under investigation, rival not banned, rel > -40. Personality-gated accept (shark .85 / politician .7 / pragmatist .35-.65 / coward .3-.55 / purist .04), rel/400 modifier, x0.3 for clean rivals (alignment>30), floor .02. Accept -> GS.mafiaBonus={type:'rivalthrow',rival}, +10 rel, +10 heat, align -8, 15% Intercepted Call evidence. Refuse -> clean/purist report (+12 heat, 50% Witness Statement, rel -12), others +4 heat rel -6, no fix. Match calc: rivalthrow weakens OPPONENT both innings (bat x0.62 / bwl x0.72). UI: premium angular red '#rp-throw-btn' in next-rival showRivalProfile + flavor text; pre-match #fix-active-text shows '<Rival> is folding — their team weakened'. 5 new E2E in comprehensive.spec.js (test.describe 'Underworld Core'); full suite 125 passed 2026-07-09 (8.3m); browser-verified live chain (button->accept deducts blackMoney->rivalthrow set->pre-match banner). Next increments: 4 mafia/Syndicate screen redesign, 5 politicians/elections, 6 local leaders, 7 remaining redesign screens.

Inc4 showSyndicateScreen() .syn-screen (Don Anna Seth + 2 lieutenants Rukhsana Mirza/Balwant Teja, rel meter, syndicateTier badge Made Man>=60/Associate>=20/Known>=-20/On Notice>=-60/Marked, offer button #syn-hear-offer-btn) offer locks (.syn-offer-locked) when !mafiaAccess (alignment>=45) / case open / marked / debts>=5; data-zone=underworld. Inc5 showNetaScreen() .pol-screen (2 fictional candidate posters Bhupathi Rao-Vikas Morcha / Savitri Devi-Jan Shakti Party, power/ally, demand block, memory); fundNetaCampaign(idx) 300 coins while election<=3 && !backed -> neta.backed set, align -3; data-zone=politics. Inc6 showBhaiScreen() .str-screen (Sikandar Bhai + 2 crew Munna Tawde/Kaali Prasad, rel meter, hafta block); courtBhai() 130 coins -> rel +12/courted/heat+1/align-3; bhaiFavor(key) crowd(90 coins)/pitchprep(110 B$) -> single GS.bhaiBonus slot, guarded vs stacking with GS.mafiaBonus; payHaftaFromScreen() clears clock; squadPitchLean() -> TURNING/SEAMING/FLAT; data-zone=streets. Inc7 scoped CSS re-skins (test-protected selectors preserved): league+XI+scorecard Cricket green, market Economy teal, scout Law steel-blue, customise/settings Hub noir+gold. 8 new E2E in comprehensive.spec.js (test.describe 'Underworld Core'); full suite 133 passed 2026-07-09 (9.1m), zero regressions. features.behavior: Light theme is the default; dark noir theme available via a Settings → Appearance toggle, persisted in the save and applied before first paint
features.evidence: Shipped 2026-07-10 (founder directive). html[data-theme=light] token override layer (~60 tokens: ivory surfaces, ink text, deepened accents, light glass/elevations) over the existing dark base; hardcoded colors converted to rgb channel vars (--hl-rgb x155, --ov-rgb x20 overlay scrims, --chrome-rgb, --abyss-rgb); noir set-pieces (mafia banner, pack rows, vault hero, ad billboard, underworld/streets modals, corruption report) stay dark with locally re-mapped light text tokens; inc-7 zone-reskin pale text deepened for ivory. GS.darkTheme default false + applyTheme() + pre-paint boot script (reads cu_save_v3, sets data-theme + meta theme-color, no flash). Toggle: #theme-toggle-row/#theme-switch in Settings Appearance section. 2 new E2E (test.describe 'Theme'): light default; toggle->dark->persists across reload->toggle back. Browser-verified screenshots across hub/squad/cards/league/auction/market/settings light + syndicate/bhai noir set-pieces + dark mode.

features.behavior: BUILD-SHEET-10K F1 — Daily Login Streak: escalating 7-day reward cycle on the hub; boot advances streak on new-day return, resets on a missed day (best streak preserved), claim grants that day's reward once and persists across reload
features.evidence: Shipped 2026-07-11. GS.loginStreak/lastLogin/bestLoginStreak/loginClaimedDate (defaults + load persistence). processDailyLogin() at boot (same-day no-op / +1 on consecutive day / reset-to-1 on gap, bestLoginStreak = max). LOGIN_REWARDS 7-day curve (Day1 200c, Day2 300c, Day3 500c+5g, Day4 600c, Day5 800c+10g, Day6 1000c, Day7 1500c+25g), cycles via _loginCycleIndex. renderLoginPanel() -> hub daily-reward row (streak/best header, per-day tiles, current highlighted, claim button). claimDailyLogin() grants once/day, sets loginClaimedDate, guarded against double-grant. 3 E2E (F1 group): day-2 increment+grant+persist, same-day no re-grant, missed-day reset (best preserved) — all green. Browser-verified: '2-day streak · best 3', 'CLAIM DAY 2 · 300 COINS'. Exploit self-review: clock-set replay bounded by loginClaimedDate day-string; only reward is coins/gems within F2P curve, no cash-out. BALANCE-TESTER GATE (2026-07-11): SIGNS OFF on the reward curve — F2P-generous-but-fair, no >20% win gap, no cash-out. Residual 🟡 (deferred, offline self-harm-only, not launch-blocking): F1-1 clock-forward streak farming, F1-2 concurrent-window multi-claim — logged in PROGRESS fix-queue.

features.behavior: BUILD-SHEET-10K F2 — Empire Net-Worth + League Rank line on hub: 'Your empire: C X · Rank #Y of 10', recomputes live after squad/balance changes
features.evidence: Shipped 2026-07-11. computeNetWorth() = coins + gems*gemRate + blackMoney*bmRate + sum(playerMarketValue). playerMarketValue(p) blends stats*rarity multiplier (RARITY_VALUE_MULT). getEmpireRank() ranks player among the 10-team league by net worth (returns {rank,total:10}). formatCompactCoins() -> '14.8K' style. renderEmpireLine() -> #empire-value (coin 'C' unit, NOT rupee — rupee is a LOOK-pillar task) + #empire-rank-lbl ('#1 OF 10 LEAGUE RANK'); called from updateHub after auction/match. 3 E2E (F2 group): renders coin value + rank in [1,10]; net worth recomputes exactly on +100000 coins; adding a legendary player raises net worth by its market value — all green. Browser-verified 'YOUR EMPIRE · C 14.8K · #1 OF 10'.

features.behavior: BUILD-SHEET-10K F3 — Surface + polish monetization: Vault, Sponsor Break and Syndicate Contract all reachable within 2 taps of the hub; rewarded-ad stub grants a reward; published gacha drop-rates page (Play policy)
features.evidence: Shipped 2026-07-11. Hub #hub-money-strip: angular clip-path tiles #hub-vault-tile (gold, 1 tap -> showStore/The Vault) + #hub-sponsor-tile (blue, 1 tap -> showRewardedAd('pack') -> free 2-card Sponsor Pack, guarded vs daily-cap + squad-full); Syndicate already 1 tap via #hub-pass-panel. updateHubSponsorTile() dims tile + 'back tomorrow' when pack ad cap spent. Published drop rates: #odds-overlay reachable from #hub-odds-link AND #store-odds-link; renderOdds()/poolRarityPct() compute per-rarity % from live ALL_PLAYERS distribution (honest: openPack draws uniformly from unowned pool), 3 pack blocks x 5 color-coded rarity rows (Common 26/Uncommon 32/Rare 26/Epic 14/Legendary 2%) + per-pack floor rule + legal note (odds shift with collection, no duplicates, virtual only, no cash-out). 3 E2E (F3 group): 3 surfaces <=2 taps; odds page 3 blocks x 5 rows summing to ~100%; sponsor stub grows squad — all green. Browser-verified strip + drop-rates page. Constraints #3 (no gambling) + #4 (gacha rates published) honored. BALANCE-TESTER GATE (2026-07-11): SIGNS OFF on F3 mechanics — floor labels match openPack code, odds page live-computed (can't drift), no infinite ad-farming (caps hold), no real P2W (billing is a non-charging stub). Two in-scope polish fixes applied this pass: F3-3 odds legal note now states shown %'s are BASE pull rates and each pack's final-card floor means actual results meet-or-beat them; F3-4 adToday() now uses local-date boundary (_todayStr), consistent with daily-login reset (was UTC). features-10k F3 group still 3/3 green. 🔴 BLOCKER (deferred, tied to storefront/billing decision, NOT a today-gate): F35 Vault store completePurchase() grants free currency in 'test mode' and F3's hub Vault tile surfaces it — must be gated behind real Play Billing or neutralized before any Play Store push. Residual 🟡 deferred: F3-2 aborted-ad burns daily spot (touches shared purse/pack/boost ad machinery — needs full-suite regression). All in PROGRESS fix-queue.

features.behavior: BUILD-SHEET-10K F4 — Anonymous analytics: localStorage user id + event log, computable D1/D7 cohorts, must not break offline PWA
features.evidence: Shipped 2026-07-11. ANALYTICS module on SEPARATE localStorage key cu_analytics_v1 (isolated from game save cu_save_v3), all try/catch-wrapped -> silent no-op on failure (offline-safe). Lazy _anLoad() (avoids var-hoist boot order issue). trackEvent(n,p) -> {n,t,p} appended; analyticsSessionStart() fires 'session_start' at boot; getAnalytics() returns {uid,installDay,events[]}; computeRetention() returns {uid,installDay,totalEvents,daysActive[],d0,d1,d7}. Instrumented at purchase_stub + odds_view (extensible). 3 E2E (F4 group): session_start fires + queryable; custom event logs + D1/D7 computable + d0 true; store separate from save AND game still boots error-free with analytics wiped — all green.
